title: @everyone
text:
@everyone 

📣 GTA Lorcana — Server Update

A few things have been cooking behind the scenes. Here's what's new:

🌐 Website Rework
Fully rebuilt — cleaner, faster, more useful. Check it out at [gtalorcana.ca](https://gtalorcana.ca/) and share with people in your community!

⭐ Roles
We now have a rarity-based role system reflecting your league achievements, assigned automatically based on your results. See <#1483899917616550080> for the full breakdown and to make sure your account is linked correctly.

🤖 Bot Updates
The GTA Lorcana Bot has been running quietly — here's what it actually does:
<#1479988278164852746> — automatically updated with active local stores and stores that need our support
<#1253943193519784028> — standings pulled and logged automatically after events
<#1422319248218525727> — auto-populated starting two weeks before set champs season
<#1481489441746059395> (beta) — monitors events for open spots. Get notified when space opens up in a watched event (yes, this means you, Montreal CCQ)
Full automation means less room for manual corrections — results should be submitted correctly at your local store. If something looks wrong, message Ryan.

💜 Server Boosts
We're at Level 1. Five more boosts gets us to Level 2, which would unlock custom role icons — the actual Lorcana rarity symbols on your roles. I already contribute 2 boosts myself. If you've been thinking about it, now's a great time.

💬 Feedback
Have ideas? City roles? Something broken? Something you'd like to see? Drop it in <#1346159732490240020> or use the anonymous form linked there.
author: GTA Lorcana
